tasks.label: Iniciar sistema completo (backend + frontend)
tasks.command: start powershell -NoExit -Command "cd backend; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000"; start powershell -NoExit -Command "cd frontend; npm start"

tasks.label: Iniciar sistema completo (backend + frontend)
tasks.command: start cmd /k "cd backend && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000" & start cmd /k "cd frontend && npm start"
